infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: TripTracker records your route and speed during trips, including when the app is backgrounded.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: TripTracker needs background access to record your full route while driving.
